chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-534 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge For directions For orders on CMA No.3523/2023 For hearing of CMA No.3524/2023 07-03-2024 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner does not press listed application. Accordingly same is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
